mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_data_scopes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY scope_type, scope_id

SELECT uds.id, uds.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, uds.scope_type, uds.scope_id, uds.scope_name, uds.include_children, uds.created_at, uds.created_by, cu.real_name AS created_by_name FROM user_data_scopes uds LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = uds.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users cu ON cu.id = uds.created_by AND cu.deleted = 0 WHERE uds.user_id = #{userId} AND uds.deleted = 0 ORDER BY uds.scope_type, uds.scope_id

SELECT uds.id, uds.user_id, u.username, u.real_name, uds.scope_type, uds.scope_id, uds.scope_name, uds.include_children, uds.created_at, uds.created_by FROM user_data_scopes uds LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = uds.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE uds.scope_type = #{scopeType} AND uds.scope_id = #{scopeId} AND uds.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.real_name

WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS (
SELECT d.id FROM departments d INNER JOIN user_data_scopes uds ON uds.scope_type = 'DEPARTMENT' AND uds.scope_id = d.id AND uds.user_id = #{userId} AND uds.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT d.id FROM departments d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.parent_id = dt.id INNER JOIN user_data_scopes uds ON uds.scope_type = 'DEPARTMENT' AND uds.user_id = #{userId} AND uds.include_children = 1 AND uds.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 ) SELECT DISTINCT id FROM dept_tree

SELECT DISTINCT c.id FROM classes c WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND (
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_data_scopes uds WHERE uds.scope_type = 'CLASS' AND uds.scope_id = c.id AND uds.user_id = #{userId} AND uds.deleted = 0 ) OR
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_data_scopes uds WHERE uds.scope_type = 'GRADE' AND uds.scope_id = c.grade_id AND uds.user_id = #{userId} AND uds.include_children = 1 AND uds.deleted = 0 ) OR
EXISTS ( WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT d.id FROM departments d INNER JOIN user_data_scopes uds ON uds.scope_type = 'DEPARTMENT' AND uds.scope_id = d.id AND uds.user_id = #{userId} AND uds.include_children = 1 AND uds.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT d.id FROM departments d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.parent_id = dt.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 ) SELECT 1 FROM dept_tree WHERE id = c.department_id ) )
